message:
test(pipeline): add test case for cancelled event notification

Adds test coverage for NotifyCancelled event type in ShouldNotify().
Currently cancelled events never trigger notifications because there's
no NotifyOnCancel setting yet. Test documents this expected behavior
and will serve as a reminder if cancel notifications are added later.
